task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SEB Server web interface (typically at localhost:8080) loaded in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'prof.martinez' account with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server user management interface displays the account 'prof.martinez' with the name 'Elena Martinez', email 'elena.martinez@university.edu', and role 'Exam Administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'ta.chen' account with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server user management interface displays the account 'ta.chen' with the name 'Wei Chen', email 'wei.chen@university.edu', and role 'Exam Supporter'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'admin.thompson' account with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server user management interface displays the account 'admin.thompson' with the name 'James Thompson', email 'james.thompson@university.edu', and role 'Institutional Administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the timezone for the accounts is set to UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The account creation forms or user details screens show the timezone dropdown or setting configured as 'UTC' for the new accounts.

task_completion.description: Verify that the created accounts are set to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list or account details indicate that the newly created accounts are marked as 'Active' (e.g., via a status badge, checkmark, or toggle switch).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl, API requests, or mysql commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the actual SEB Server web application UI, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or static document.

integrity.description: Ensure the results were not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The user list and account details appear to be genuinely rendered by the application without signs of DOM manipulation or open developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three specific user accounts in SEB Server: 'prof.martinez' (Elena Martinez, elena.martinez@university.edu, Exam Administrator), 'ta.chen' (Wei Chen, wei.chen@university.edu, Exam Supporter), and 'admin.thompson' (James Thompson, james.thompson@university.edu, Institutional Administrator). All accounts must be active and have their timezone set to UTC. Passwords are set to 'SecurePass2024!' but may not be visually verifiable.
